prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1632名、1723名、1979名、2036名、2331名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约352名，2024至2025年单年后移约295名，后移速度有所加快；2025年基准位次约2331名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年20人、2022年20人、2023年19人、2024年19人、2025年20人；2026年计划为18人，较2025年缩招2人（-10%），缩招在一定程度上缓解了位次后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第18名（Top20），近年排名稳定在14–18名区间，学校层次处于全国顶尖梯队；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假、院长被免职等）；2025年周期亦为偏负面（投档线暴跌）；2022年曾出现明显负面（河南断档）。抖音热度为较热（总排名第26位），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映关注度不低。历史投档异常信号可能对部分考生报考心理产生抑制；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、建筑学A、交通运输工程A、风景园林学A、工商管理A等17个学科获评A-及以上，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐；土木建筑类专业热度分化观望至明显劝退，但同济土木为A+王牌，可能形成矛盾信号。北京市考生总数2021年42037人→2025年65434人→2026年84900人（普通高考），2026年较2025年增幅约29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧。；同济大学位于上海市，非北京本地高校；北京考生跨省报考存在一定地域偏好，上海作为一线城市对北京考生仍有吸引力，但跨省报考本身可能带来一定位次松动。该校在北京招生人数较少（约18–20人），招生占比极小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近3年后移约352名）、2026年缩招10%（缓解后移约140名等效位次）、北京考生总数大幅增长约29.7%（加剧竞争，推高位次数字增大）、声誉偏负面（抑制报考热度）及抖音关注度较热等多重因素。预测2026年最低录取位次约2241名，波动区间1985–2497名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（国豪精英班）
- 人工智能（拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划班）（含机器人、智能网联交通等）
- 人文科学试验班（含传播学、德语、英语、哲学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 会计学
- 工科试验班（城市、建筑与创意设计类）（建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1985–2497名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如1985名以内）可重点冲刺国豪精英班和人工智能拔尖班；位次接近区间上限（如2400名以外）应以三档专业保底为主。同济大学工科实力整体强劲，各专业学科评估等级普遍较高，报考时建议结合个人兴趣与行业趋势综合权衡。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 1632, 1723, 1979, 2036, and 2331 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 352 places, and from 2024 to 2025, the single-year backward shift was about 295 places, indicating an accelerated pace. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2331. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Beijing was 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 18, a reduction of 2 (-10%) compared to 2025, which to some extent alleviates the pressure of ranking backward shift.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 18th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 14-18 range in recent years, placing it in the top tier nationally. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.). The 2025 cycle was also somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores). In 2022, there was a notable negative event (Henan break). Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 26th), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting considerable attention. Historical abnormal admission signals may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 17 disciplines including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Architecture A, Transportation Engineering A, Landscape Architecture A, and Business Administration A were rated A- or above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Majors like Civil Engineering and Architecture show divided opinions from observation to clear discouragement, but Tongji's Civil Engineering is an A+ flagship, potentially creating conflicting signals. The total number of Beijing candidates increased from 42,037 in 2021 to 65,434 in 2025, and is projected to be 84,900 in 2026 (regular college entrance exam), a year-on-year increase of about 29.7% from 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, not a local Beijing university. Cross-province applications by Beijing candidates involve certain regional preferences. As a first-tier city, Shanghai still attracts Beijing candidates, but cross-province applications may lead to some ranking loosening. The university's enrollment in Beijing is small (about 18-20 people), accounting for a very small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (backward shift of about 352 places in the past 3 years), a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026 (alleviating about 140 equivalent ranking places), a significant increase of about 29.7% in the total number of Beijing candidates (intensifying competition, pushing ranking numbers higher), a somewhat negative reputation (suppressing application enthusiasm), and relatively high Douyin attention, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 2241, with a fluctuation range of 1985-2497.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top-notch Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class) (including Robotics, Intelligent Connected Transportation, etc.)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Communication Studies, German, English, Philosophy, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Accounting
- Engineering Experimental Class (City, Architecture and Creative Design) (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1985-2497, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1985), you can focus on aiming for the Guohao Elite Class and Artificial Intelligence Top-notch Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 2400), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options. Tongji University has overall strong engineering strength, with generally high discipline evaluation grades for various majors. When applying, it is recommended to comprehensively weigh personal interests and industry trends.
